goal: Add the verified external CUDA launcher shell to the operator packet required committed files and verifier-required path set, then refresh packet evidence against source commit f2227bf.

blocked_scope: Changing model catalog pins, hashes, or release acceptance policy
Downloading or committing model weights, adapters, Docker images, endpoint transcripts, copied evidence bundles, or GO release evidence

phase_notes.plan: Include the verified external CUDA launcher shell in the packet required committed file set so the preferred external entrypoint is source-pinned.
phase_notes.audit: Current recertification points operators to artifacts/review/verified_external_cuda_training_launcher.sh, but the operator packet required_committed_files does not require that launcher shell.
phase_notes.build: Add the launcher shell to packet generation, verifier required paths, focused tests, refreshed packet artifacts, docs, completion log, and PABCD.
phase_notes.check: Run focused packet generator/verifier tests, py_compile, regenerate packet at f2227bf, verify packet GO, JSON/search evidence, bootstrap m1-smoke, and diff checks.
phase_notes.done: After verification passes, stage, commit, and push this packet launcher required-file phase.
